My app on the App Store

 Available on the App Store

Easy Meal App

A complete recipe companion with 595 dishes from around the world. Firebase auth, SwiftData persistence, YouTube integration and a beautifully crafted native UI.

SwiftUISwiftData FirebaseCombine SwiftCore Data
  • 595 recipes from around the world, available in 175 countries
  • Firebase Auth with AuthenticationServices & CryptoKit security
  • YouTube video integration per recipe
  • Advanced filtering by meal type and country
  • Weekly cooking stats & smart favorites management

Background

The Engineering Mindset

Mechatronics gave me hardware, software, and systems thinking. iOS gives me the canvas to build things people actually use.

⚙️
Mechatronics Foundation

My engineering degree blended hardware, software, and control systems — giving me a unique perspective when architecting iOS apps. I think in systems, not just features.

📱
Native iOS Focus

I choose Swift and SwiftUI because native matters. Smooth animations, proper HIG compliance, and tight system integration are non-negotiable for great products.

🌍
Shipped to 175 Countries

Easy Meal App is live on the App Store worldwide. Building production software taught me what no course can: how real users interact with your product.

📐
Always Learning

Currently deepening expertise in Swift 6 concurrency, TDD, and the Combine reactive stack. I actively follow WWDC sessions and the full Apple developer ecosystem.
